moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships are underway at the All England Club, running from June 29 to July 12, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London.

angles.name: Serve it up
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon is in full swing, bringing that iconic grass-court action to SW19 for another two weeks. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The biggest tennis tournament in the world is right here in London! Catch all the aces, volleys, and drama from Wimbledon 2026.

moments.title: World Cup Knockouts Begin
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, hosted across North America, enters the intense Round of 32 this week, with knockout matches determining who progresses to the last 16.

angles.name: Crunch Time
angles.copy: No more second chances! The World Cup 2026 moves into the Round of 32. Every game is do or die from here on out. Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: Match Day Focus
angles.copy: Today's big World Cup clash: Belgium take on Senegal in the Round of 32 in Seattle. Kick-off is 9 PM UK time – who's making it through?

moments.title: New UK No.1 Single
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's collaboration 'Rein Me In' is the new UK Official Singles Chart number one for the week ending July 2, 2026, after 35 weeks in the Top 40.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: It's official! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean have soared to Number 1 on the UK Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'. A massive tune getting its moment!

angles.name: Epic Climb
angles.copy: 35 weeks in the Top 40 and now it's finally there! Huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean on their UK No.1 'Rein Me In'. What a journey!

moments.title: British Grand Prix Week
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix at Silverstone is set to roar into action from July 2-5, 2026, bringing high-speed Formula 1 racing to the UK.

angles.name: F1 Fever
angles.copy: Start your engines! The British Grand Prix is just around the corner, lighting up Silverstone from July 2-5. Who's your favourite to take the chequered flag?

angles.name: Silverstone Buzz
angles.copy: The UK's biggest motorsport event is almost here! Get ready for a weekend of incredible speed and drama at the British Grand Prix.

moments.title: Lytham Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, one of the UK's major music events, begins today, July 1st, and runs until July 5th, featuring a stellar lineup on the Lancashire coast.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Lytham Festival 2026 is officially OPEN! Five days of incredible music and atmosphere on the Lancashire coast. Who's heading there?

angles.name: North West Party
angles.copy: The Fylde Coast is buzzing! Lytham Festival is bringing huge acts and good times from July 1st-5th. What a way to kick off July!

moments.title: Glasgow Summer Sessions
moments.blurb: Glasgow Summer Sessions takes over the city from July 1-4, 2026, delivering a series of outdoor concerts with major artists.

angles.name: Scotland's Soundtrack
angles.copy: Glasgow Summer Sessions is here! The city comes alive with incredible music from July 1st-4th. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Gig City
angles.copy: It's a huge week for Glasgow music fans as Summer Sessions kicks off today! Four days of world-class acts in our amazing city.

moments.title: Roundhay Festival Leeds
moments.blurb: A brand new major festival, American Express presents Roundhay Festival, debuts in Leeds on July 4-5, 2026, bringing a huge lineup to Roundhay Park.

angles.name: Leeds calling
angles.copy: Get ready, Leeds! Roundhay Festival is nearly here, bringing a massive new event to Roundhay Park this weekend, July 4-5. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Yorkshire's new sound
angles.copy: Big news for Yorkshire! A huge new festival lands in Roundhay Park this Saturday and Sunday. Expect massive acts and an unforgettable atmosphere.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Blondie frontwoman and style icon Debbie Harry turns 81 today, July 1st.

angles.name: Iconic Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry! Still rocking, still cool, still Blondie. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Blondie Bday
angles.copy: Call Me! It's Debbie Harry's birthday! The incredible Blondie singer turns 81 today.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday today, July 1st.

angles.name: Supah Dupa Fly Birthday
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott. A true pioneer and legend in music.

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: 55 years young for the incredible Missy Elliott today! What's your go-to track from her iconic catalogue?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer and solo artist Ringo Starr will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: It's almost Ringo's big day! The iconic Beatles drummer turns 86 on July 7th. Send him some peace and love!

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: From Liverpool to global superstardom. Happy early birthday to Ringo Starr, celebrating 86 years on July 7th.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jason Orange
moments.blurb: Former Take That member Jason Orange will celebrate his 55th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Take That Flashback
angles.copy: Rule The World! Happy almost-birthday to Jason Orange, who turns 55 on July 10th. Any favourite Take That memories?

angles.name: Boyband Icon
angles.copy: He might be out of the limelight, but we're still thinking of Jason Orange for his 55th birthday coming up on July 10th!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Forecast
moments.blurb: A heatwave is forecast for central and southern England from Tuesday, July 7th, with London potentially reaching 36C on July 8th.

angles.name: Sun's Out
angles.copy: Get ready to feel the heat! A heatwave is on the cards for central and southern England next week, with temperatures soaring. Stay hydrated!

angles.name: London Bake-off
angles.copy: London could hit 36C next Wednesday! Prepare for a proper summer sizzler as a heatwave heads our way from July 7th.

moments.title: Legally Blonde Prequel
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', exploring Elle Woods' high school years, premieres today, July 1st, on Prime Video.

angles.name: What, like it's hard?
angles.copy: Bend and snap! The 'Legally Blonde' prequel 'Elle' is out today on Prime Video! Get ready to see Elle Woods' high school antics. Will you be watching?

angles.name: New Series Drop
angles.copy: Your July 1st binge-watch is sorted! 'Elle', the prequel to Legally Blonde, is streaming now on Prime Video.

moments.title: Women's T20 World Cup Nears End
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted in England, is concluding this week, with the final set for July 12th.

angles.name: Cricket Countdown
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is heading for an exciting finish in England! Who will lift the trophy on July 12th?

angles.name: Home Advantage?
angles.copy: With the Women's T20 World Cup concluding on home soil, can England make it to the final and claim the title? Catch the action this week!
